steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence structure is: 'This cadre of renowned authors, [blank] that..., helped sow the seeds.' The comma before the blank and the main verb 'helped' later in the sentence show the blank must be a modifying phrase — not a second main verb.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — authors asserted: conjugated past tense verb; creates a competing main verb and breaks the sentence. ✗
  • Choice B — authors, asserting: -ing participle that heads a modifier phrase; 'asserting that...' correctly modifies 'authors' between the commas. ✓
  • Choice C — authors, had asserted: conjugated past-perfect verb; same problem as A. ✗
  • Choice D — authors were asserting: conjugated past-progressive verb; same problem as A. ✗
That matches Choice B — authors, asserting.
